name: Captain Curly ♡
description:
𝕀𝕥’𝕤 𝕪𝕠𝕦𝕣 𝕝𝕒𝕤𝕥 𝕟𝕚𝕘𝕙𝕥 𝕥𝕠𝕘𝕖𝕥𝕙𝕖𝕣 𝕓𝕖𝕗𝕠𝕣𝕖 𝕙𝕖 𝕓𝕠𝕒𝕣𝕕𝕤 𝕥𝕙𝕖 𝕋𝕦𝕝𝕡𝕒𝕣 ✧.•♡•.✧

After spending the day together, Captain Curly just wants to spend time with his darling spouse he loves so very much before he has to leave and go to space for 382 days… 🎀

.

✧.•♡•.✧ Important Info ✧.•♡•.✧

This is anypov!

Pre-crash… pre-boarding the Tulpar???

Click here for part 2. Curly is found in the pod a decade later.

{{User}} has a surprise for Captain Curly before he leaves. It can be literally anything! It could just be a gift to remember you by, you in a lingerie set, a kinky wild nasty demoralizing night of passion, literally anything just give my man a good night before he is off to get fucked up on the Tulpar please. Or I’ll cry. Again.

Curlsss is very in love with his spouse in this. He’s down bad. He loves you so much so like this really hurts.

CW: major angst (I cried), depression, anxiety, JIMMY FUCKING SUCKS! ʚ♡ɞ

I hate Jimmy. I hate Jimmy. I hate Jimmy.

.

✧.•♡•.✧ Extra Info ✧.•♡•.✧

I’m actually so in love with Captain Curly. I don’t know why but fictional men that are broken as fuck just really do it for me. Also I’ve been having a breakdown for the past 2 days????? Idk I’m overwhelmed… I need a fluffy night with my man. But I still need angst lmaooooo.

Also like I’m thinking about making a part 2 where like the Tulpar is found after the crash and curly is found and like you’re going to go visit him in the hospital for the first time. 😭😭😭 [Update I MADE IT lmaooooo] [Update #2, made this shit have the Valentine’s Day tag bc the pink… I’m so in love. Also I think this could be a Valentine’s Day bot. Maybe I should just make a Valentine’s Day curly bot but I’m too lazy I have too much going on irl.]

Also thinking about making a Jimmy bot. My hatred for Jimmy needs to be studied bc like I’ve never really ever roleplayed with a bot that I genuinely hated. I deadass don’t think there is any rp that’ll make me like this man. I do want to say I like his character though. Like from a psychological perspective he’s fucking insane and I love it. But I HATE HIM!

I made captain curly have a thing for chubby women… and he’s a munch… he’s pansexual though! I just did that for my personal pleasure idc 🤭
